title: ASTS Stock Price Forecasts and Analyst Consensus
text: According to 7 analysts, the average rating for ASTS stock is Hold with a 12-month stock price target of $69.6, representing a 14.07% decrease from the latest price of May 2026. The most bullish analyst values AST SpaceMobile at $117 per share, while the most bearish prices it at $41.20, indicating a wide range of analyst opinions reflecting uncertainty. Following the latest Q1 2026 results, AST SpaceMobile's nine analysts are forecasting revenues of $169.1 million in 2026, representing a 99% improvement in revenue compared to the last 12 months. The satellite maker is expected to turn a profit in 2028. While the company holds ample cash reserves of approximately $3.5 billion, analysts expect AST SpaceMobile to consume about $1.6 billion and $800 million in cash in 2026 and 2027, respectively, with positive free cash flow not anticipated until 2028. Losses are supposed to decline, shrinking 13% from last year to $1.42 per share.
